info.name: Oracle Fusion Cloud Applications Oracle Fusion Project Management REST API

description.content:
REST APIs for Oracle Fusion Cloud Project Management, enabling integration with project planning, project costing, project billing, grants management, and project execution capabilities. The API supports managing project resources, tasks, budgets, deliverables, change orders, awards, and financial project plans.

Contact Support:
 Name: Oracle Support
 Email: support@oracle.com
